name: fill_whiteboard_with_plantuml
description: Fills whiteboard blocks with PlantUML or Mermaid diagram code. Accepts any number of whiteboards. Returns per-item success/failure details.

whiteboardId.description:
Whiteboard token (required). Found in board.token of a block with block_type=43.
Example: "EPJKwvY5ghe3pVbKj9RcT2msnBX"

code.description:
Diagram code (required). The complete diagram code to create in the whiteboard.
Supports both PlantUML and Mermaid formats.
PlantUML example: "@startuml
Alice -> Bob: Hello
@enduml"
Mermaid example: "graph TD
A[Start] --> B[End]"

items.description: Whiteboard fill item: target whiteboard ID, diagram code, and syntax type.

whiteboards.description:
Array of whiteboard fill items (required).
Example: [{whiteboardId:"token1", code:"@startuml
Alice -> Bob: Hi
@enduml", syntax_type:"plantuml"}, {whiteboardId:"token2", code:"graph TD
A-->B", syntax_type:"mermaid"}]
